01 / 03 Real Estate  ·  STR

STR Renovation — Pinamar, Argentina

From abandoned inheritance
to fully booked STR

When I inherited a share of a house in Pinamar — a coastal town on Argentina's Atlantic shore — it hadn't been properly cared for in years. Yellowed walls, dated 1980s furniture, a crumbling parrilla. The bones were solid. What followed was a cross-border renovation managed entirely remotely from Tampa, ending with a branded, fully operational short-term rental. Drag the sliders below to see every room transform.

2
Floors renovated
8+
Guests capacity
100%
Remote managed
USD
Indexed revenue
Living room
BeforeAfter

Yellowed walls + dark credenza → clean white surfaces, rattan lighting, new grey sectional.

Parrilla & outdoor kitchen
BeforeAfter

The most dramatic transformation — a mossy, crumbling corner rebuilt into a full outdoor kitchen.

Dining room
BeforeAfter

Colonial dark wood + mismatched chairs → Tolix dining set with striped linen and pendant lights.

Managing a renovation from Tampa while navigating Argentine contractors, dollar-indexed costs, and a seasonal rental calendar taught me more about operations under pressure than any corporate role ever did.

— Federico Patronis
The finished property

The parrilla at dusk — the heart of any Argentine summer rental.

What this demonstrates
Cross-border project management
STR brand creation & operations
Remote contractor coordination
USD-indexed revenue structuring
Real estate value creation
Hospitality guest experience design
02 / 03 Product  ·  AI

Personal AI fitness coach — live demo

Profe — built for one athlete,
trained on real data

A personal AI coaching PWA that wakes up every morning already knowing what you did yesterday, how sore your muscles are, what Tampa weather looks like at 7 AM, and exactly what weights to put on the bar. No generic advice. No onboarding. Just a briefing from a coach who's been watching your last two weeks closely. Tap through the demo below.

Today's brief

Today is Pull — back and biceps. Your lats logged clean RPE 7s last week across all working rows. Target: Cable Row 4×8 @ 150 lb. Bump 5 lb from last session's 145 which you hit clean. Energy High, soreness Med — solid state.

"A bad session isn't a bad week. Zoom out." — Ted Lasso

03 / 03 Automation  ·  PropTech

Autonomous property scout — Argentina-wide

Buenos Aires Scout — disciplined,
tireless, opinionated

Every Sunday at 10 AM, this agent wakes up on its own. It scrapes two Argentine listing platforms across 9 GBA Norte neighborhoods, deduplicates across sources, scores every property with Claude Vision, runs a deal signal engine against historical baselines, and lands in your inbox 10 minutes later with a clear verdict: move now, push hard, wait and watch, or skip. Hit run to watch the pipeline fire.

💾
Load memory
listing_history.json · feedback_log · config
🔍
Scrape sources
MercadoLibre + Argenprop · 9 neighborhoods · parallel
🤖
Claude Vision
Score condition · amenities · classification per listing
⚡
Deal signals
Price vs baseline · DOM · price drops · feedback comps
📬
Sunday briefing
PDF + Excel → Gmail inbox · history updated
